prompt: Identify and research competitors for a cloud-migration proposition targeting mittelstaendische-stadtwerke-de (German Stadtwerke, 500-5000 employees). Who competes with T-Systems for Stadtwerk IT modernization and cloud migration deals? Include trap questions. After generation, run the stakeholder review loop with CSO and Market Industry Analyst reviewers until convergence.

assertions.text: Each has positioning, strengths, weaknesses, differentiation
3-4 trap questions in file-level trap_questions array
No dimension below 3 from either reviewer
